summary: Completed testing of iteration 8 features: (1) Fullscreen enforcement for LiveInterview - gate shows 'Fullscreen Required' card with 'Enter Fullscreen & Start' and 'Cancel' buttons, (2) Prep timer after TTS - code review confirms prep timer overlay and 'Record Now (skip wait)' button exist (cannot fully test TTS/recording in headless browser), (3) Send Feedback to Email - REAL email via Gmail SMTP working correctly. All 13 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified working.

frontend: Landing page loads with testimonials carousel
Login page loads with email/password form
Role-Based and Resume-Based interview options present
Fullscreen gate has 'Enter Fullscreen & Start' button (data-testid='enter-fullscreen-btn')
InterviewReview page loads with summary and tabs
InterviewReview 'Send to Email' button calls real API - success toast shown
InterviewHistory page loads with filter dropdown
InterviewHistory 'Send Feedback to Email' dropdown calls real API - success toast shown

critical_code_review_comments: LiveInterview.js has ESLint warnings about missing dependencies in useCallback hooks (lines 178, 207) - minor, does not affect functionality
Prep timer and auto-recording logic looks correct - starts after TTS onend event, counts down from time_per_question, auto-starts recording when timer reaches 0
Fullscreen exit detection properly aborts interview and navigates to dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 tested 3 NEW tasks: (1) Fullscreen enforcement - LiveInterview shows fullscreen gate before starting, exiting fullscreen aborts interview. (2) Prep timer after TTS - after Sarah speaks, countdown timer appears (= time_per_question), auto-starts recording when timer reaches 0, 'Record Now' button skips wait. (3) Send Feedback to Email - NOW REAL via Gmail SMTP (arghyanilryzen@gmail.com), sends HTML email with summary + Q&A feedback. All send-feedback calls verified working from InterviewReview, InterviewHistory, and Dashboard (code verified). Completed interview ID for testing: int_3c3ecc23bd34.

fullscreen_enforcement.exit_aborts_interview: Code verified - calls /api/interviews/{id}/abort and navigates to dashboard

prep_timer_after_tts.auto_start_recording: Code verified - autoStartRecording() called when prepCountdown reaches 0
prep_timer_after_tts.note: Cannot fully test TTS/recording in headless browser - code review confirms implementation

send_feedback_email.status: REAL - sends actual email via Gmail SMTP

frontend_integration.InterviewReview: sendToEmail() calls real API - verified working
